Class LibraryManagement

java.lang.Object
libraryApp.LibraryManagement
public class LibraryManagement extends Object
Singleton class managing the library system. Handles books, members, loan records, and file persistence. REFACTORING IMPROVEMENTS: ✓ Added comprehensive JavaDoc documentation ✓ Improved error handling and logging ✓ Better code organization with clear sections ✓ Reduced code duplication ✓ Enhanced validation logic ✓ Improved file I/O with better error messages ✓ Thread-safe singleton implementation

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static LibraryManagement getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of LibraryManagement. REFACTORING: Thread-safe implementation
      Returns:
      The library management instance

    • LoadDataFiles

      public void LoadDataFiles()
      Loads all data files (books, members, loans). REFACTORING: Single method to load all data

    • getAllBooks

      public ArrayList<Book> getAllBooks()
      Returns all books in the library.

    • findBook

      public Optional<Book> findBook(String id)
      Finds a book by its ID. REFACTORING: Using Optional for safer null handling
      Parameters:
      id - Book ID to search for
      Returns:
      Optional containing the book if found

    • addBook

      public String addBook(String id, String title, String author, String category, int year, int copies, String type, String downloadLink, double fileSizeMB)
      Adds a new book to the library. REFACTORING: Improved parameter validation and error messages
      Parameters:
      id - Book ID
      title - Book title
      author - Book author
      category - Book category
      year - Publication year
      copies - Number of copies
      type - Book type ("E-Book" or "Physical")
      downloadLink - Download link (for E-Books)
      fileSizeMB - File size in MB (for E-Books)
      Returns:
      Success or error message

    • updateBook

      public String updateBook(String id, String title, String author, String category, int year, int copies)
      Updates an existing book's details. REFACTORING: Clear error handling and validation
      Parameters:
      id - Book ID to update
      title - New title
      author - New author
      category - New category
      year - New year
      copies - New number of copies
      Returns:
      Success or error message

    • removeBook

      public String removeBook(String id)
      Removes a book from the library.
      Parameters:
      id - Book ID to remove
      Returns:
      Success or error message

    • getAllMembers

      public ArrayList<Member> getAllMembers()
      Returns all members in the library.

    • getMember

      public Member getMember(String id)
      Finds a member by their ID. REFACTORING: Consistent with findBook() but returns null for backwards compatibility
      Parameters:
      id - Member ID to search for
      Returns:
      Member object or null if not found

    • addMember

      public String addMember(String id, String name, String email, String phone)
      Adds a new member to the library.
      Parameters:
      id - Member ID
      name - Member name
      email - Member email
      phone - Member phone
      Returns:
      Success or error message

    • removeMember

      public String removeMember(String id)
      Removes a member from the library.
      Parameters:
      id - Member ID to remove
      Returns:
      Success or error message

    • borrowBook

      public String borrowBook(String bookId, String memberId)
      Borrows a book to a member. REFACTORING: Improved validation and error messages
      Parameters:
      bookId - ID of the book to borrow
      memberId - ID of the borrowing member
      Returns:
      Success, warning, or error message

    • returnBook

      public String returnBook(String bookId)
      Returns a borrowed book to the library. REFACTORING: Improved loan record handling
      Parameters:
      bookId - ID of the book to return
      Returns:
      Success or error message

    • getLoanHistory

      public ArrayList<LoanRecord> getLoanHistory()
      Returns the loan history.

    • loadBooksFromFile

      public boolean loadBooksFromFile()
      Loads books from file. REFACTORING: Improved error handling and parsing logic
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • saveBooksToFile

      public boolean saveBooksToFile()
      Saves books to file.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • loadMembersFromFile

      public boolean loadMembersFromFile()
      Loads members from file. REFACTORING: Improved error handling
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • saveMembersToFile

      public boolean saveMembersToFile()
      Saves members to file.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise
